summary: A standard for the storage of metadata in contract Wasm files.

sections.title: Contract Metadata Storage
sections.content: Features for storing metadata in Wasm custom sections

contract_meta_features.name: contractmetav0_section
contract_meta_features.description: Support for storing metadata in "contractmetav0" Wasm custom sections

contract_meta_features.name: multiple_entries_single_section
contract_meta_features.description: Support for multiple metadata entries in a single custom section

contract_meta_features.name: multiple_sections
contract_meta_features.description: Support for multiple "contractmetav0" sections interpreted sequentially

sections.title: Encoding Format
sections.content: XDR encoding format for metadata entries

contract_meta_features.name: scmetaentry_xdr
contract_meta_features.description: Use SCMetaEntry XDR type for structuring metadata

contract_meta_features.name: binary_stream_encoding
contract_meta_features.description: Encode entries as a stream of binary values

contract_meta_features.name: key_value_pairs
contract_meta_features.description: Store metadata as key-value string pairs

sections.title: Implementation Support
sections.content: SDK support for parsing and extracting contract metadata

contract_meta_features.name: parse_contract_meta
contract_meta_features.description: Parse contract metadata from contract bytecode

contract_meta_features.name: extract_meta_entries
contract_meta_features.description: Extract meta entries as key-value pairs from contract
